pi_items.source: task.json specification field, not a data claim
task.json specification field, not a data claim

Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT Genre, SUM(Bytes)/1048576.0 as MB FROM Genre JOIN Track GROUP BY Genre ORDER BY MB DESC LIMIT 1. Drama has 30,941.59 MB, Rock has 11,141.36 MB. Task description specifies sorting by TotalMB descending.
Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE GenreId=(SELECT GenreId FROM Genre WHERE Name='Rock'). Result: exactly 1297 tracks.
Chinook SQLite database query: SELECT SUM(Bytes)/1048576.0 FROM Track WHERE GenreId=(SELECT GenreId FROM Genre WHERE Name='Rock'). Result: 11,141.36 MB, which is 3.2% higher than claimed 10,800 MB.
Verified in setup_libreoffice_base.sh and export_result.sh scripts that copy/reference this path

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a synthetic dataset with 11 tables representing a digital media store. Rock is the largest genre by track count (1,297 tracks) but NOT by storage size (11,141.36 MB, ~3.2% above claimed 10,800 MB). By total storage size as requested in the task description, Drama is the largest genre (30,941.59 MB). The ODB file is created at /home/ga/chinook.odb from official Chinook SQLite source (github.com/lerocha/chinook-database).
